message: Morning team! Anyone else need a triple espresso today?
You're not the only one Bez! The reports from last week are still giving me nightmares.
Tell me about it Tinus.
But hey at least it's sunny outside today. :sunrise:
True a little sunshine makes everything better.
Also I'm having my usual green smoothie. That's my secret energy booster.
Nice Bez! I'll stick with my coffee though.
Anyone else excited for the launch of the new BitCoin :coin: payment feature this week?
Absolutely Daniel! Been looking forward to it.
By the way no spoilers but did anyone catch the football game? Epic comeback!
I missed it! I was knee deep in a sci-fi novel. Anyone else into that?
Oh I love sci-fi! Can you share the name of the book Shay?
I've been reading a bit of sci-fi myself.
Looking forward to sharing recommendations Shay!
There's always so much happening outside of work! Keep the energy :battery: going team.
It's going to be another productive day. :raised_hands:

Welcome to The Chain the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

? *Use `/help` at any time for a list of useful links and commands*
 ? *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin
Hey we're getting reports of customers struggling to make purchases
@here Anyone else seeing this?
Yes I've noticed the same @Bob . It seems like an error in the system
Whatever it is we need to sort it out quickly.
we need to step on it! before the social media backlash is turning into a storm.
Who is handling incidents today? Please size up the issue this is urgent
I'll take incident command
Bob can you get a screenshot of what customers are seeing?
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
Anyone else seeing the "HTTP Status: 500 Internal Server Error" error on the site?
:star: Reproduces the incident
I can see the same issue
Just because someone give me the changelog
:star: Check changes done to the platform
Here are the recent changes : https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/MjMxNGU0ZjU1ZTVhNDA0NWJmY2M1NjU1OGFiMGY2YjA
Hamed and Daniel are your teams reporting anything anomolous?
*Incident Number INC10000:* SEV-1 website down
I'll pull in Tanya to look into infra
:star: Incident record created
:star: Send first comms in first 5 minutes
Looks like we have a SEV-1 here
Sure let me check the logs
I can check the infra
:star: Incident record created
:star: Send first comms in first 5 minutes
I'll pull in Tanya to look into infra
Do we have more data about what customers are reporting ?
Bob tell customers that we're looking into an issue impacting the online shopping experience
Getting over 120+ reports looks like customers unable to make payments
Looks like a global issue
Daniel I'm stilling waiting to hear back from Bob here: https://comms.prod.uptimelabs.io/sonic-com/pl/b69s4q67qfreum99a6udqt3uno
:star: Manage actions and timings
They are seeing cart errors on the website
Hamed and Daniel is it Platform or Software teams that own the Payment Service?
Initially reports started to come with bitcoin payments not going well. Later all payments were not working
Customers are having issue with what looks like Payments
:star: Qualify the problem
I am having a look into payments app
[ERROR]
Summary: Website down - Pulling in dept. heads - Assign someone to look at it
:star: Formally assign criticality level to the incident
:star: Form an effective investigation team
There seems to be an error coming up from cart service which act as an upstream for payments
[WARN]
Cart service is software?  Who is the Subject Matter Expert on it?
Do we know at what time issue has started to appear ?
:star: Know your team and their roles
Good q Tanya.  Bob when did you get your first report?
I own all the app logic but infra part is looked by Hamed's team
Around 2 hrs ago
Whats the current theory ?

Daniel rollback your changes - if it's non-destructive to checkout and other services:
Change ID: CHG89777
Even the one that is non-prod:
Change ID: CHG89772
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
I've got a meeting with board in next 15 mins
Shall i rollback cart service change then ?
Summary: Payment service isn't working - Have people digging into the infrastructure - Daniel is rolling back some changes to Cart Service
:star: Reviewed changes
Yes
If it's non-destructive
But the latest change was into payments around 2 hrs ago
In other words rollback should NOT affect other currencies
Yeah Daniel roll this one back too:\nChange ID: CHG89779
Bob you got the comms out to customers?
@PLAYER lets ground here for a bit. What informations we have about the symptoms
I'll keep the users informed. Do we have an ETA for the fix ?
Hamed Payment and Cart services seems to be affected.  Assumption (working theory): changes in pord need rolling abck.
:star: Form a working theory
Bob no ETA
Ok i'll rollback payment service first
Understood I'll proceed with rolling back the payment service
payment service rollback is complete
This is not good. Something is broken after the payment rollback
Website still down - so get the other changes rolled back too.  Just to confirm.
I doubt only payment's rollback is going to work.
Initial reports started with customers complaining about bitcoin payment method
3 changes went for bitcoin feature
Is there any ETA for the fix ?
Summary: Cart Service still down - Rolled back the prod change but no fix - getting the other changes rolled back too
No ETA
Complete cart service and cart redis is down
Daniel roll all those bitcoin changes back
I did a restart but now it failed again after payments rollback
Tanya rollback your Change ID: CHG89778
You're right. We need to rollback in sequence for all these 3 changes
Ok doing it now
I'm rolling back cart service
I am doing for cart redis
Customer complaints are rising now
Report when rollbacks are complete
Rollbacks are completed
Great i've also restarted the frontend so the website should be working now
Rollback done
Site still broken
Rollback the two UAT changes Daniel
@PLAYER can you confirm?
@Tanya have you restarted the cache  followed by frontend ?
I mean Shay and Daniel:\nshay: Change ID: CHG89759\ndaniel: Change ID: CHG89772
I'm still seeing site down
Hamed has a good thought.  Shay please do.
I did it. Will be up in few mins
I can see it back again
Summary: Site still down - Rolled back prod changes to no affect - restarting services on the backend (platform team)
I can place the order again
Website is up - Bob have customers retry
:star: Cross check resolution with stakeholders
I can see the order metrics are going up a bit. And no new reports in last min
Great @PLAYER
Summary: Website is up right now - Restarted backend service after all prod rollbacks for bitcoin - Customers retrying site
:star: Confirm resolution with the business
Are we good to close the incident ?
Not yet - Bob customers need to confirm issue is fixed
I checked again and the customers are no longer reporting any more issues
We'll need a postmortem after this to look at what went wrong with the bitcoin deployment
Yeah I would call the incident over
Great work everyone! The payments issue has been resolved and customers can now check out smoothly
It appears that everything has returned to its normal state
Phew! Glad we got that sorted. Fantastic teamwork!
Absolutely! Proud to be a part of this team
Thank you @PLAYER for coordinating the rollback effectively
I was worried for a bit but everything looks good now.
I've been monitoring the financial metrics and they're already improving
Summary: Incident over - Confirmed with customers no more errors - Now buy me lunch
Brilliant job team and @PLAYER!
